zh.lifeSummary: 當William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill於1480年6月18日之前出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾時，他的父親Sir John Sempill 1st Lord Sempill14歲，母親Margaret Colville23歲。他於1501年3月13日與Baroness Margaret Montgomery在蘇格蘭艾丁波結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1552年6月3日在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill于1480年6月18日之前出生在苏格兰雷福福爾时，他的父亲Sir John Sempill 1st Lord Sempill14岁，母亲Margaret Colville23岁。他于1501年3月13日与Baroness Margaret Montgomery在苏格兰艾丁波结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1552年6月3日在英国苏格兰艾丁波，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Sempill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Semple
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): nickname from Middle English, Older Scots, and Old French simple ‘simple, straightforward, humble’ (from Latin simplus). The Scottish name was taken to Ulster in the 17th century, and a Scottish family of this name held the hereditary post of Sheriff of Renfrewshire from the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill was born before 18 June 1480, in Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, Sir John Sempill 1st Lord Sempill, was 14 and his mother, Margaret Colville, was 23. He married Baroness Margaret Montgomery on 13 March 1501, in Edinburgh, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 3 June 1552, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill est né avant 18 juin 1480, à Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Sempill 1st Lord Sempill, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Margaret Colville, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Baroness Margaret Montgomery le 13 mars 1501, à Edinburgh, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 3 juin 1552, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill vor 18. Juni 1480 in Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Sempill 1st Lord Sempill 14 und seine Mutter Margaret Colville 23. Er hat am 13. März 1501 in Edinburgh, Scotland Baroness Margaret Montgomery geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Juni 1552 in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill è nato il prima del 18 giugno 1480 nel Renfrewshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir John Sempill 1st Lord Sempill, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Colville, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Baroness Margaret Montgomery il 13 marzo 1501, nel Edinburgh, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 giugno 1552, nel Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempillが1480年6月18日以前にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Sempill 1st Lord Sempillは14歳，母Margaret Colvilleは23歳であった。1501年3月13日にスコットランドエディンブルグでBaroness Margaret Montgomeryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1552年6月3日にイギリススコットランドエディンブルグで死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill(이)가 1480년 6월 18일 이전 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Sempill 1st Lord Sempill(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Colville(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1501년 3월 13일 스컷랜드 에딘버그에서 Baroness Margaret Montgomery(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1552년 6월 3일 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.before 18 June 1480–3 June 1552: antes 18 de junho de 1480–3 de junho de 1552
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill nasceu antes 18 de junho de 1480, em Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Sempill 1st Lord Sempill, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Colville, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Baroness Margaret Montgomery em 13 de março de 1501, em Edinburgh, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de junho de 1552, em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill родился перед 18 июнь 1480 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John Sempill 1st Lord Sempill было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Colville, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Baroness Margaret Montgomery 13 марта 1501 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 3 июня 1552 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.before 18 June 1480–3 June 1552: antes de 18 de junio de 1480–3 de junio de 1552
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Sempill 2nd Lord of Sempill nació antes de 18 de junio de 1480, en Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John Sempill 1st Lord Sempill, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Margaret Colville, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Baroness Margaret Montgomery el 13 de marzo de 1501, en Edinburgh, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de junio de 1552, en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
